name: Ananya Iyer
summary: Ananya details the Judge Advocate General entry process and how she balanced her law degree with SSB psychology preparation.
data: As a law graduate, the JAG entry is the perfect way to serve the nation. During my first SSB, I was underprepared for the physical tasks. In my second attempt at Allahabad, I worked on my physical stamina and focused on expressing my thoughts clearly. The interview involved detailed questions on constitutional law, international humanitarian law, and mock legal situations. I handled them by applying standard legal principles calmly. Maintain a balanced approach, show empathy in your answers, and display confidence in your body language.
